final_prompt.prompt:
Generate a screenshot of a Douyin (TikTok) livestream featuring "神仙姐姐" streaming.

Style/medium: needs a mobile livestream interface aesthetic — exact UI styling is yours
Composition: must be vertical 9:16 mobile screen format, streamer centered with sign held in hands
Subject: must include a female streamer ("神仙姐姐" persona) holding a sign
Scene/backdrop: must be a typical livestream room interior — exact room styling is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, inviting livestream atmosphere — exact light setup is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！" on the sign
Constraints: must preserve 9:16 vertical aspect ratio, must look like a genuine Douyin livestream screenshot
Avoid:
